project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite + Zustand board game app
build_system: Vite with tsc type-checking, npm scripts
test_command: npm run build (type-check only, no tests)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` - must compile without errors
environment_constraints: No test runner available. Verification is limited to TypeScript compilation via `npm run build`.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts) manages all game state. Game logic lives in src/utils/gameLogic.ts with pure functions that take/return GameState. Components use createPortal(jsx, document.body) for popups with classes battle-popup-overlay and battle-popup-card. i18n in src/i18n/en.ts and es.ts. Icon components in src/components/Icons.tsx (VPIcon, CoinIcon, HonorIcon, RoninIcon, BushiIcon, ShintoIcon, MonsterIcon). ClanShield component for clan seals. Battle flow: battleStepPhase drives popup->bidding->result transitions. The resolveNextBattle function in gameLogic.ts resolves tactics in order (seppuku, take-hostage, hire-ronin, imperial-poets) then determines winner by force.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/utils/ - game logic, src/types/ - TypeScript types, src/i18n/ - translations, src/img/ - images
